title: ATField GNR vs EVA1
wikitext:
[]: ATField GNR vs EVA1             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Fri Jul 14, 2006 12:59 am Alright after watch the opus eva avm i just thought of something. The wings that EVA1 has and GNR have are very similar... only a few differnces, EVA1's looks like an ATF but are very similar is shape to GNR's wings. Could GNR's wings be an ATF? I mean they just pop out of her back just as EVA1's poof in from thin air, but then comes the question, is GNR a giant naked ATF? The ATF has been manipulated into many things (sea of duroc(excuse spelling if any...)) why not a avatar? *edit* I'm asking if GNR is just an illusion created by the ATF, Now could someone respond I'm going insain waiting!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 14, 2006 3:54 am Considering when GNR falls apart her dismembered body parts land with big boomy sounds and send up giant spouts of blood-red water, I would say that her body is quite physical (except when it isn't ;) ). Wings of Light seem to be something independent from ATF -- well, if Adam is to be believed. The four giant wings appearing at 2I emerge from the middle of the explosion that blew Adam's own body apart (and sent her disembodied soul flying off with all those others), so apparently they don't connect to anything...

[]:             Quote Post by defiate » Fri Jul 14, 2006 4:02 am but in one of your theories, reichu, didnt you say that the wings represented power, the number of wings represents the amount of power and how the pylons on the evas (or just eva01) repress the power? for example in EoE when eva01 appeared, broke it's pylons and sprouted four wings of light, and later on when eva01 breaks out of GNR and sprouts 12 huge wings/spider legs (that's how i see them) and ends complementation.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Fri Jul 14, 2006 12:24 pm On topic: GNR is pretty real. Evangelion never uses illusions as far as I know. @defiate I guess what we see is actually thick AT-Field. Like the bones of a wing, but the wing itself could not be seen. But those of GNR's are sure made of flesh. I wish there would be AT-Field-photography in Evangelion. Or something similar...

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Fri Jul 14, 2006 1:33 pm I've always thought EVA 01's wings are ATF generated, meant to show just how powerful her ATF has become. As for GNR's wings, well, I don't think those are related. GNR got her wings BEFORE absorbing EVA 01 and the Tree of Life, and if GNR uses ANYTHING, it's Anti ATF, and not ATF in general. The whole point of 3I is that NOTHING can resist her, except for the will of man. There's no physical force to beat her. Humans become puddles of goo, and all the EVAs are either destroyed or under her partial or complete control.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 14, 2006 1:56 pm defiate wrote: but in one of your theories, reichu, didnt you say that the wings represented power, the number of wings represents the amount of power and how the pylons on the evas (or just eva01) repress the power?

[]:             Quote Post by Rawinder » Mon Jul 17, 2006 3:33 pm Reichu wrote: The wings vanish when she is "cupped" by GNK's hands, and right after this she is endowed with the Fruit of Life (off-screen) and merges with the Spear of Longinus to form the Tree of Life.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 17, 2006 4:22 pm Rawinder wrote: The NGE2 CI...

[]:             Quote Post by Rawinder » Mon Jul 17, 2006 5:38 pm Reichu wrote: That seems to be a bit of a simplification, I'm afraid. If you observe the show itself (which is more important than an extratextual source that thrives on being vague and confusing), it seems to be fairly clear that the S^2 Engine is a physical manifestation of the FoL, and the latter is entirely spiritual (metabiological, if you will). You can eat the meat and get an S2 that way, or be "equipped" with one (a la the Eva Series), but there isn't any indication that the flesh is endowed with the spirtual element and an S2-less and FoL-less entity will automatically be complemented once they get the former.

Article: ATField GNR vs EVA1
     Quote Post by Rawinder » Mon Jul 17, 2006 5:38 pm Reichu wrote: That seems to be a bit of a simplification, I'm afraid. If you observe the show itself (which is more important than an extratextual source that thrives on being vague and confusing), it seems to be fairly clear that the S^2 Engine is a physical manifestation of the FoL, and the latter is entirely spiritual (metabiological, if you will). You can eat the meat and get an S2 that way, or be "equipped" with one (a la the Eva Series), but there isn't any indication that the flesh is endowed with the spirtual element and an S2-less and FoL-less entity will automatically be complemented once they get the former.
